failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and chose the last item in the ascending price list instead of the first, producing an incorrect cheapest-item answer.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The correct tool call was made and returned 11 available Electric Kettles sorted by price ascending. The first item in the tool result is item_id 1240311797 at $137.17, so the evidence needed to answer was available before synthesis. At index 4, the Executor incorrectly selected item_id 2243454707 at $164.46, which is actually the last and most expensive item in the returned sorted list. This is a reasoning error over relevant tool output, not an invalid invocation or unsupported intent.
